title: The Sad Sad Tale of Yui Ikari
display_title: The Sad Sad Tale of Yui Ikari
wikitext:
[]: The Sad, Sad Tale of Yui Ikari             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:09 pm What happens to Yui Ikari in End of Evangelion is quite possibly the saddest thing to happen to anyone/anything in anything NGE-related ever. I didn't even think about it the first couple of times I saw it (aside from how magnificent the scene was visually), but... Yui Ikari wrote: Humans can only exist on this earth, but the Evangelion can live forever... along with the human soul that dwells within. Even five billion years from now, when the Earth, the Moon, and the Sun are gone, Eva will exist. It will be lonely, but as long as one person still lives...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:14 pm Probably the fact that Yui will be out in space alone, although I wouldn't put it past Rei 3/Lilith to have done SOMETHING, whatever that would be.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:20 pm I don't think that's Rei at all. The color is off. She looks too white-ish yellow, like Yui appears in the scenes where she talks to Shinji (such as when they are trapped together in the Dirac ocean, or in the scenes in EoE where she appears.) Rei usually has a more blueish aura around her. So I'm proposing that that is, in fact, Yui herself . I could be wrong, of course. If I'm right, though, could that explain why Unit 01 is stone?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:21 pm And why would Yui appear in Rei's clothes? Also, Eva-01 lost the helmet somewhere in there.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:24 pm I dunno. Maybe it has something to do with her appearing as a soul? Oh, and Rei is Yui's clone, so... Well, this is entirely in the realms of speculation, but then again, so is the rest of this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:28 pm As long as she's living, heaven can be found, or so it goes V V

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Nov 25, 2008 5:53 pm I have the thought that maybe Eva-01 became a new SoL, floating on the universe with a Lance of Longinus device as a pair, probably waiting to land down somewhere and restart life. But thinking this way arises the question... did post 3I lilim achieve Fruit of Life? After all they came back after intervention from a being mixing 2 SoL's with both fruits.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Nov 25, 2008 6:01 pm I expect Yui will either fully ascend to godhood, become the SoL for another world, or go slowly mad until the eva is either the only thing in existance or it eventually breaks down into undifferentiated quarks and fades away into the vacuum. Still not as sad as the similar robot > stone fate as Optimus Prime, however.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 25, 2008 7:15 pm Prime comes back >.> I would assume that Yui will well..Float for a while and.. 1. Maybe 01 will smash into Earth and who knows, it all happens again. You know SEELE and their Craaaazy plans. 2. Become a "God"...She is such a nice woman. 3.Float around forever but what is after...end. What is after everything is gone. Only Yui will know.... 4.SOL, could happen.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 25, 2008 7:38 pm SoL? Unit 01 became petrified and immobile. Yui is SOL.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Nov 25, 2008 7:49 pm That particular line of thought came from Bochan Bird's translation of a line from EoE: EoE, BB translation wrote: Makoto: AT Field shifting to pattern red! Fuyutsuki: The Fruit of Life possessed by Angels, And the Fruit of Wisdom possessed by humans... (The Lance penetrates the core and merges with EVA-01 into the Tree of Life) Fuyutsuki (off screen): Having obtained them both, EVA-01 has become like a God. And now it has been restored to the propagule of souls ... the Tree of Life. Will it become the Ark to save humankind from the nothingness of Third Impact? Or the demon that destroys us all? Our future lies in the hands of Ikari's son.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 25, 2008 7:49 pm We see a closeup shot of that screencap NAW-kun uploaded; it is indeed Rei. To be honest, I wonder if Yui would become a SoL as well, but what exactly would back that up besides her having the Spear?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 25, 2008 7:53 pm I do kind of take back the statement that Unit 01 became completely petrified as well... the armor certainly is, but that flowy hair is definitely flexible.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Nov 25, 2008 7:57 pm Hm, maybe, somewhere in the vastness of space, another sentient race has been created by a mysterious giant entity, know as Yui. Well, maybe not. But really, other than her having a spear and maybe a potential for a CoG, Yui will just float off into the cosmos. She doesn't even have a Moon of her own, unless she happens to land inside an asteroid and send it into extreme motion toward a planet, she won't do anything.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Nov 25, 2008 8:27 pm Didn't Eva-01 obtain both fruits? That means fruit of life. Can only be stopped by Lance of Longinus now. Same as SoL's. I'm not that sure of the petrified part. Even if petrified, does that mean inactive? After all we see the blue hairs of doom coming from Eva-01 head while it travels through the solar system.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 25, 2008 8:29 pm evacommentary.org wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 25, 2008 9:17 pm The script says that Eva-01 "petrifies" (when you see the armor go dark and become cracked), but for the later shot in space they say she's "back to purple" (and with that inexplicable hair, of course). There are still grey patches around the entry plug insertion point, though. ...try fanwanking a reason for why Yui would "petrify" and then "unpetrify" later. I highly prefer the Seed of Life possibility to the lame-o "floating artifact" one, although people like to use the stuff about "loneliness" as a monkey wrench. (Never mind that "loneliness" seems to fit the job description of Seed remarkably well.) Regarding the bochan_bird translation: It's not "propagule of souls". It's "propagule/embryo of (a) life/lives", which is still so abysmally vague as to be pretty useless. (Souls in terms of little red dots aren't being referred to at all.)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 25, 2008 9:31 pm So the script actually specifically states that Unit 01 unpetrifies? Interesting. Rei's appearance still hasn't been explained at all, though. The only explanation I've seen put forth is that it's actually Yui's soul leaving Unit 01, but that doesn't make sense as Yui's soul would be a red dot. Rei, while having a physical manifestation that resemble's Yui's, is Lilith for all practical purposes. She just prefers to keep her Rei form, even after remembering who she "really" is.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Tue Nov 25, 2008 9:38 pm Perhaps it simply isn't in chronological order... with Rei's appearance, well, she had her job to do and really was never one for causality so no peculiarity there anyway. Not sure what's up with the hair though, perhaps the angle masks the helmet or something. btw, one thing that this does tell us though is that even with a S2 engine, energy eventually runs out :P EDIT: or maybe Rei takes over after Yui "dies", explaining the renewal of energy and blue hair....

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 25, 2008 9:53 pm Zaque wrote: Not sure what's up with the hair though, perhaps the angle masks the helmet or something.
